name: Cream knit loungewear set - ribbed tank, wide-leg pants, oversized cardigan
why: This is EVERYTHING I want for my cozy evenings. The cream knit set with ribbed tank, wide-leg lounge pants, and oversized cardigan plus fluffy slippers and matcha — it’s the perfect 'I'm not leaving the house' aesthetic. I can see myself wearing this while journaling or just being soft at home. It feels like a warm hug.
